figures.caption: Table 2: Convergence study for CP-WENO, LCD-WENO, RI-WENO, and CRI-WENO schemes.
Figure 1: Comparison plots for Test Problem 5.1 of RI-WENO, CP-WENO, LCD-WENO and CRI-WENO schemes.
Figure 2: Comparison of the CP-WENO, LCD-WENO, and RI-WENO schemes with the exact and Godunov solutions for Test Problem 2 on a mesh with Nx = 200 at the final time t = 2.5.
Figure 3: Comparison of CP-WENO, LCD-WENO, and RI-WENO with the exact and Godunov solutions for Test Problem 3 at Nx = 200 and t = 1.0.
Figure 4: Comparison of CP-WENO, LCD-WENO, and RI-WENO with the exact and Godunov solutions for Test Problem 4 at Nx = 200 and t = 5.0.
Figure 5: Comparison of CP-WENO, LCD-WENO, and RI-WENO with the exact and Godunov solutions for Test Problem 5 at Nx = 200 and t = 1.0.
Figure 6: Comparison of film heights f and g for different values of k < 1 at t = 1.00.
Figure 7: Comparison of film heights f and g for different values of k ≥ 1 at t = 1.00.
Figure 8: Test Problem 7 with 400 × 400 grids and t = 1.0.
Figure 9: Test Problem 8 with 400 × 400 grids and t = 0.2.
